name: meok.ai — ISO-42001 FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions about ISO-42001 on meok.ai

acceptedAnswer.text: The international standard for AI Management Systems (AIMS). Published in December 2023.
Any organization developing, deploying, or using AI systems — especially in regulated sectors.

mainEntity.name: How does MEOK help with ISO 42001?

acceptedAnswer.text: Meok's iso-42001-ai-mcp audits AIMS controls and generates signed attestations.
